## ToggleNamespace type

Canonical Forge Space namespaces. Legacy 'uiforge-mcp'/'uiforge-webapp' kept for backwards compat.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ToggleNamespace = 'global' | 'mcp-gateway' | 'ui-mcp' | 'siza' | 'uiforge-mcp' | 'uiforge-webapp';
```
